title: Ender's Modpack Tweaks
description: General Tweaker mod inspired by Universal Tweaks, with a focus on modpacks.
body:
# Ender's Modpack Tweaks

This is a collection of tweaks and changes for the modpacks I'm working on. I will be adding more as I go along. Now that I'm somewhat comfortable writing mods, I don't have to rely on other mods to make the changes I want. Each feature can be enabled or disabled in the config file, so you can pick and choose what features you need for your own modpack. If you have any suggestions, feel free to let me know.

## [▶ Current Features](https://github.com/Ender-Development/EnderModpackTweaks/blob/master/FEATURES.md)

I wrote up a whole document as the feature list just got too long to keep it updated in multiple places at once.

## Dependencies

Since version 0.2.1 AssetMover isn't strictly required anymore, but some features break if it's not installed. This was made for the 2 people who asked to make it optional. I won't waste any more time on that.
